provisions.title: There is hereby appropriated f r o m funds
provisions.content:
ARTICULO 1. There is hereby appropriated f r o m funds
in t h e National Treasury not othlerwise appropriated t h e s u m of
ONE THOUSAND EIGHT HUNDRED AND FIFTY DOLLARS
($1,850.00) t o cover t h e cost of repairs on the wharf at Azua.
S. S . ROBISOh.,
